title: Directed Graphs, Strong Components, and Condensation
description: Analyze circular dependencies and group mutually reachable services. Learners cumulatively produce a strongly-connected dependency report through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use discovery and finish structure to reason about directed reachability.
Compute strongly connected components and validate mutual reachability within each result.
Collapse strong components into an acyclic condensation graph.
